jobs.name: UOL
jobs.description:
APIs
Development of APIs, focused on providing data to be used by various systems and departments within the company.

Automation of Publications on Advertising Platforms
Creation of scripts for bulk publishing and updating on ad management platforms used by the Operations team.

Advertising Creation
Development of advertising pieces for display on UOL and partner sites with CSS animations.

Website and Internal Systems Development
Responsible for developing websites for new publications.
Responsible for creating the new FAQ system for various UOL departments.
Development of automation tools for bulk content import and update.

User Access Control System
Development of an internal system for access management, with an intuitive interface and relational database integration.

jobs.name: Gigaservices
jobs.description:
Interface Development with Ruby on Rails
Creation and maintenance of views in Ruby on Rails applications, applying JavaScript, jQuery and Bootstrap to ensure functional and responsive interfaces.

Feature and Back-End Implementation
Development of new features using Ruby, with data manipulation in PostgreSQL database and test coverage with RSpec.

Quality and Support
Collaboration in application testing and direct customer support, contributing to the identification and resolution of technical issues.
